quantification.why: Nearly every comparison carries a computed figure, e.g. Gadget 'out-earning second-place Widget ($2,118.94, 29.6%) by 12.9%' and North 'averages $272.04 per order against West's $202.12'.

specificity.why: Each recommendation names products, regions, and figures actionably, e.g. 'grow its Gadget sales ($299.00 vs North's $747.50)' and 'Revisit Sprocket pricing... at $4.75 each'.

insight_density.why: Multiple non-obvious, actionable observations appear, such as Sprocket being '63.1% of all units sold yield just 15.8% of revenue' and that the regional 'gap comes from order value, not order frequency'.

quantification.why: Essentially every comparison carries a computed figure, e.g. Gadget 'out-earning second-place Widget by 12.9%' and North '53.8% more than last-place West' plus per-order averages ($272.04 vs $202.12).

specificity.why: Every recommendation names products, regions, and figures actionably, e.g. 'grow its Gadget sales ($299.00 vs North's $747.50)' and 'Revisit Sprocket pricing... 63.1% of all units sold yield just 15.8% of revenue at $4.75 each.'

insight_density.why: Multiple actionable, non-obvious observations appear, e.g. Sprocket's volume/revenue inversion (63.1% of units, 15.8% of revenue) and that the regional gap 'comes from order value, not order frequency.'

quantification.why: Essentially every comparison carries a computed figure, e.g. Gadget "out-earning second-place Widget ($2,118.94, 29.6%) by 12.9%" and North "53.8% more than last-place West."

specificity.why: Every recommendation names products, regions, and figures and is actionable, e.g. "grow its Gadget sales ($299.00 vs North's $747.50)" and "Revisit Sprocket pricing or bundle it: 63.1% of all units sold yield just 15.8% of revenue."

insight_density.why: The prose surfaces multiple non-obvious, actionable observations like Gadget's revenue concentration from only 16 units, Sprocket's volume/revenue mismatch, and that the North–West gap "comes from order value, not order frequency."
